testsuite.name: com.rousecontext.tunnel.TunnelClientImplTest

testcase.name: connect transitions DISCONNECTED to CONNECTING to CONNECTED[jvm]
connection failure emits error on SharedFlow[jvm]
disconnect sends CLOSE for all streams[jvm]
OPEN frame received emits to incomingSessions[jvm]

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
